hero.title: Your Reliable Worldwide Airport Transfers
hero.subtitle: Premium private transport service with professional drivers and guaranteed punctuality.

gdpr.text: I accept the privacy policy and terms of service.

checkout.noVehicles: No vehicles are available for this trip. Try another time or contact us.
checkout.stripeMissing: Online payment is not available yet. Please contact us to book.

routePreview.title: Route estimate
routePreview.etaNote: Drive time is indicative (traffic varies). Final price is confirmed when you choose a vehicle class.
routePreview.availabilityNote: Indicative amount from available rates; exact price depends on the class you select.

success.title: Booking scheduled (awaiting payment)
success.message: Thank you — your Way2Go transfer is pre-booked. Payment details and link will be sent to the client's email.
success.referenceHint: Keep this reference until payment is confirmed.

errors.generic: Could not submit your booking. Please try again.
errors.gdpr: You must accept the privacy policy.
errors.distanceRequired: Could not calculate route distance. Please adjust pickup/dropoff and try again.

items.question: How can I cancel my reservation?
items.answer: You can cancel for free up to 24 hours before the service. Between 12h and 24h, 50% will be charged. Less than 12 hours, the full amount will be retained.

items.question: Does the driver wait for me at the airport?
items.answer: Yes, our driver will be waiting for you in the arrivals hall with a sign with your name. We monitor your flight to adjust in case of delay.

items.question: What are the payment methods?
items.answer: We accept cash, debit/credit cards, MB Way and advance bank transfer.

items.question: Do the vehicles have Wi-Fi and water?
items.answer: Yes, all our vehicles are equipped with free Wi-Fi, bottled water and USB chargers for your comfort.

items.question: What is your operating area?
items.answer: We operate throughout the national territory and Spain, with special focus on Lisbon, Porto and Algarve.

footer.aboutText: Professional transfer service with more than 10 years of experience. Comfort, punctuality and discretion guaranteed.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.content: We collect the following personal data:

sections.title: 3. Purpose of Treatment
sections.content: Your data is used exclusively for:
list: Improve the quality of our service
Comply with legal and fiscal obligations

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis
sections.content: The processing of your personal data is based on your express consent and the execution of the service provision contract.

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing
sections.content: Your data is not shared with third parties, except when necessary for the provision of the service (e.g. drivers) or by legal obligation.

sections.title: 1. Object
sections.content: These terms regulate the private transfer service provided by Way2Go.

sections.title: 2. Reservations
sections.content: Reservations must be made at least 12 hours in advance. Last minute reservations are subject to availability.

sections.title: 3. Cancellations
sections.content: Free cancellations up to 24h before. Between 12h-24h 50% fee. Less than 12h no refund.

sections.title: 1. What are cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to improve navigation.

sections.title: 2. How we use
sections.content: We use technical cookies for the functioning of the site and analytical ones for visit statistics.
